sourceRef.citation: Kourovka Notebook, Problem 2.62 (Khukhro & Mazurov eds., ed.2)

statement.latex: If$G$is a finite-dimensional vector space over a field and$$is a group of automorphisms of$G$in which every element is stable, then the whole of$$is stable (E.\,Kolchin). Is Kolchin's theorem true for spaces over skew fields? { B.\,I.\,Plotkin} Yes, it is, if the characteristic of the skew field is zero or sufficiently large compared to the dimension of the space (H.\,Y.\,Mochizuki, Canad. Math. B...
